_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: pharmacologic ErbB2 inhibition (tyrphostin; AG825) decreased Nf2−/− NPC neurosphere diameters...cell survival...and glial differentiation...to WT levels
details: Pharmacologic ErbB2 inhibition (10 µM) decreased Nf2−/− NPC neurosphere diameters, increased cell death, and reduced glial differentiation to WT levels
